config.web_scraper.disabled_desc: Enable the toggle above to allow the agent to fetch external web pages and analyse their content.
config.web_scraper.summary_desc:
Scraped web pages are sent to a separate LLM that creates a summary. The agent only receives the summary instead of the full page content.
Benefits: Saves tokens in the main model and prevents prompt injection from external content. A cheap model can be selected here.
